package rulefixtures

// scenario for regexp_compile_in_hot_path: regexp.Compile or regexp.MustCompile observed inside obvious iterative paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule360NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario360Negative(records []Rule360NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
